TIN TIN Tax Identification Number (TIN) of ACO Participant Tax identification number of the ACO participant included on the ACO's certified participant list. The initial version of the file includes all ACOs who actively participated in the performance year, while the final version is limited to ACOs included in financial reconciliation. CHAR 9
